{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323173652D4989CD1BC0AA74F7526"}"},"total":1297},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496894655668372248","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的超级超级好看 ，主角12祖巫代言人，后面还可能，直接盘古代言人。想想都觉得很期待，希望作者，加油，更新差不多更个1000章！哈哈哈，希望有这么多张，因为衍生文很多都在500到600章，还没看过瘾就完结了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745510643,"group_id":"7422192958335618110","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"每日一练","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0kt7h9yRuljbqJLxntoP0I=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"486442616751257","user_name":"焱麟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"486442616751257","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7422192958335618110","book_info":{"abstract":"【盘古代理人+巫族莽子哥+夯级数值怪】

    古天辰穿越到了斩神世界，成为林七夜同学，获得盘古神殿，接受巫族传承。

    神殿内每苏醒一位祖巫，古天辰就能获得三个神墟。

    林七夜：古天辰同学，同样是神明代理人，为何你的操作如此优秀，能教教我吗？

    古天辰：操作？我一个巫族莽子，左拳高伤害，右拳伤害高，大力出奇迹，一直大力一直奇迹，平A完爆对手大招的夯级数值怪，要什么操作？

    众神国：古天辰来了，又一座神国要沦陷了……

    刚刚把什么东西碾过去了？克系三柱神？我还以为减速带呢！

    十二祖巫现身，凝聚出一道开天辟地的巨大身影！！！

    三柱神：你玩不起？？？

    扛着开天斧的古天辰指着克系神明至高主宰，化身克系众神最严厉的父亲！

    神殿内每苏醒一位祖巫，古天辰就能获得三个神墟。

    林七夜：古天辰同学，同样是神明代理人，为何你的操作如此优秀，能教教我吗？

    古天辰：操作？我一个巫族莽子，左拳高伤害，右拳伤害高，大力出奇迹，一直大力一直奇迹，平A完爆对手大招的夯级数值怪，要什么操作？

观感好，很有乐子，作者会玩梗，同时主线也是较为有趣的
很喜欢看古天辰和几位祖巫的相处，没有女主也是本书的优点之一，不会被感情绊住脚步，反正我个人喜欢这种主角没有爱情线的
本来想打四星，但想想你已经写了五百多章就给满了，不要断更就行！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752894324,"group_id":"7422192958335618110","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"欲望明月，倾照旧物。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8gMOMVql7a0FuWyqfprzk5HK1kq0Ql6utxoTTHCIZV9","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d87866b4a131416e95e38fffad24663d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791911&x-signature=%2F9Pefogq3w8z5%2FvZb0EA1%2FSaaSU%3D","user_id":"1533195776439480","user_name":"遁朽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1533195776439480","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7422192958335618110","book_info":{"abstract":"【盘古代理人+巫族莽子哥+夯级数值怪】
